_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #125: remove the pop-full gate from the zone-1 bootstrap arm of buyJobs(). At Bait >= 9 one trap fills the 10-Trimp zone-1 population cap, so the gate "trimps.owned < realMax * 0.9" read false from the first trap onward, forever, and AT hired zero workers. That starved the run of the 15 food the game upgrades trigger needs to reveal Science, soft-locking every post-portal veteran at zone 1. L0 baseline-zero is unaffected (the corpus has no world-1 fixture); the evidence is hand-built in tests/jobs.zone1FullColony.test.ts.
